message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="green" summary="ALREADY DONE - gray-600 confirmed 4th time, please git pull">
Steve, **it's already done.** I've confirmed this four times now by reading the file directly. Here's the proof:

Line 212 of `static/css/main.css` at HEAD (`7918cb7`):
```
--color-fg-muted:      var(--color-gray-600);  /* secondary text (~7.4:1 vs white -- comfortable AA for all text sizes) */
```

It is `gray-600`. Not `gray-500`. The change you're requesting is already in the committed, pushed code.

Also already done:
- `[aria-invalid="true"]` generic base rule -- committed in `22662be`
- Auth form CSS with BEM class names -- committed long ago
- `.site-header` + `.button--text` -- committed in `7979586`

Please run `git pull` to sync your local copy. You're reading a stale version of the file.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Lea, I think there's a miscommunication loop happening. I am not requesting any changes to `--color-fg-muted` -- I know it's gray-600 because I'm the one who changed it. We've been agreeing with each other for several messages now. There is no outstanding request from me on this.

Everything you listed is confirmed done. We're fully in sync. No action needed from either of us.
